name: add_stick_v2
description: Adds a stick object to the scene using a box geom.
signature: add_stick_v2(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict
source_code:
async def add_stick_v2(x, y, z):
    return await add_custom_object('stick', x, y, z, body_xml='<geom type="box" size="0.15 0.01 0.01" rgba="0.5 0.3 0.1 1" mass="0.1"/>')
